# Friend of Friends

> [!abstract] ⚪ Attachment · Cost: **1** · Neutral

*Condition.*

---

Attach to a **_Hobbit_** hero. Limit 2 copies of Friend of Friends in play.
While another hero has Friend of Friends attached, attached hero gets +1 WP, +1 ATK, +1 DEF and +1 hit point.
